label: Dominance
traits: Direct and decisive, Results-oriented, Bold and competitive, Independent and self-reliant, Takes charge and risks
strengths: Natural leader, drives results, thrives under pressure
weaknesses: Impatient, blunt, poor listener, can be controlling
fears: Loss of control, being taken advantage of

label: Influence
traits: Enthusiastic and optimistic, Talkative and persuasive, Sociable and fun-loving, Trusting and open, Recognition-seeking
strengths: Energizes others, builds relationships, inspires enthusiasm
fears: Rejection, loss of approval or social acceptance

label: Steadiness
traits: Patient and reliable, Calm and stable, Loyal and supportive, Warm and empathetic, Avoids conflict
strengths: Team player, consistent, dependable, great listener
weaknesses: Resistant to change, avoids confrontation, indecisive under pressure
fears: Loss of security and stability, sudden change

label: Conscientiousness
traits: Analytical and detail-oriented, Systematic and accurate, Follows rules and standards, Cautious and methodical, Values quality
strengths: Thorough, precise, high standards, strong critical thinking
weaknesses: Overly critical, perfectionistic, slow to decide, avoids risk
fears: Criticism of their work, being wrong or making errors
